# Successive Over Relaxation

**Summary**: An iterative method used to solve linear systems, often faster than standard SOR.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] compared PSOR and LSOR as primary iterative techniques for reservoir simulation.

## Key Results and Findings

- Point Successive Over-Relaxation (PSOR) was the most efficient among the iterative techniques. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 21]])
